codeMarkPlus.enable.description: Core: enable or disable CodeMark+ features in this workspace
codeMarkPlus.defaultLanguage.description: Core: fallback template language used when no language-specific template exists
codeMarkPlus.isCommentMessageWrapped.des: Core: wrap generated comment blocks with a visual border for emphasis
codeMarkPlus.commentMessagePrefix.descri: Core: short prefix inserted at the start of rendered comment messages
codeMarkPlus.commentDelimiter.descriptio: Core: small delimiter used inside templates to separate logical parts of the message
codeMarkPlus.commentMessageSuffix.descri: Core: short suffix appended at the end of rendered comment messages
codeMarkPlus.addEmptyLineBeforeComment.d: Core: insert a blank line before generated comment blocks
codeMarkPlus.addEmptyLineAfterComment.de: Core: insert a blank line after generated comment blocks
codeMarkPlus.literalOpen.description: Template: opening delimiter used when rendering template literals inside custom templates
codeMarkPlus.literalClose.description: Template: closing delimiter used when rendering template literals inside custom templates
codeMarkPlus.useCurrentPosition.descript: Core: prefer current cursor line instead of enclosing symbol when inserting a comment
codeMarkPlus.author.description: Template metadata: default author value used in rendered templates (editable)
codeMarkPlus.version.description: Advanced/metadata: default version string available to templates (not related to extension packaging)
codeMarkPlus.license.description: Advanced/metadata: default license string available to templates
codeMarkPlus.highlightActive.description: Core: enable in-editor highlighting of configured tags and directives
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.keyword.desc: Core rule field: keyword text to match (e.g., TODO, FIXME). Use 'pattern' for regex-based rules.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.color.descri: Style: background color for matched ranges (CSS colors accepted; rgba() recommended for translucency)
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.bold.descrip: Style: render matched text in bold
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.italic.descr: Style: render matched text in italic
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.matchMode.de: How to match: 'word' = whole tokens; 'substring' = inside a token; 'regex' = ECMAScript RegExp using 'pattern'. If omitted, inferred: 'regex' when 'pattern' exists, otherwise 'word'.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.pattern.desc: ECMAScript regular expression used when matchMode is 'regex' (example: 'BUG-\d+'). Do not include flags; prefer inline groups if needed.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.caseSensitiv: Whether matching is case sensitive. Default: true.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.wholeWord.de: Enforce whole-word matching. Default: true. Applies to 'word' mode.
Limit this rule to specific VS Code language IDs (e.g., ['typescript','javascript','python','markdown']).
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.strikethroug: Style: apply strikethrough in addition to other text styles
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.priority.des: Priority used to resolve overlapping decorations. Higher numbers win (can be negative). Default: 0.
codeMarkPlus.highlightRules.description: Core: ordered rules that detect tags or patterns and style them in-editor. Rules are used both for highlighting and for Tag Browser indexing (single source of truth).
Configuration for the decoration applied to special highlight directives (e.g., 'HIGHLIGHT: next line')
codeMarkPlus.customTemplates.language.de: The programming language for which this template applies (e.g., 'javascript', 'python', 'dart')
codeMarkPlus.customTemplates.template.de: The comment message template. Use Mustache variables like {{{commentMessagePrefix}}}, {{{commentMessageSuffix}}}, {{{fileName}}}, {{{author}}}
codeMarkPlus.customTemplates.description: Core: language-aware Mustache templates that control generated comment blocks. Define a template per language to customize insertion and metadata.
codeMarkPlus.insertComment.title: Add annotation comment
Replace annotation tag in active file
codeMarkPlus.changeWorkspace.title: Change annotation workspace folder
codeMarkPlus.tagBrowserView.title: Annotation
codeMarkPlus.tagBrowserView.welcomeMessa: No annotations indexed yet. Add TODO/FIXME/NOTE tags in code and refresh to browse them here.
Scanning: glob patterns that limit which files are scanned for tags and indexing (affects Tag Browser).
Scanning: glob patterns to exclude from indexing (recommended: node_modules, .git, build outputs).
codeMarkPlus.files.maxSearchRecursionDep: Maximum directory depth for recursive search (0 = unlimited).
codeMarkPlus.files.supportsHiddenFiles.d: Include dotfiles and hidden files (those starting with a dot) in search results.
codeMarkPlus.files.preserveGitignoreSett: Respect .gitignore rules when searching for files.
codeMarkPlus.files.showFilePathInResults: Show the relative folder path next to each file in results.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.descriptio: Core: per-tag configuration used by the Tag Browser and highlighting to convey priority, icon and color
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.priority.d: Priority used for sorting and resolving conflicts. Higher values indicate more important tags.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.icon.descr: Codicon name (e.g., $(tag)) or emoji to display for this tag in the Tag Browser.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagProfiles.color.desc: Color for this tag (hex like #RRGGBB or rgba()).
codeMarkPlus.performance.maxFilesToIndex: Performance: cap the number of files scanned by the Tag Browser to bound indexing time.
codeMarkPlus.performance.concurrencyLimi: Maximum number of files processed concurrently during indexing.
codeMarkPlus.performance.batchSize.descr: Number of files to process per batch before yielding to keep the UI responsive.
codeMarkPlus.context.contextFolder.descr: Storage: workspace-relative folder where CodeMark+ creates contextual runtime data (default: .context). Treated as workspace content, not internal cache.
codeMarkPlus.features.quickActions.descr: Advanced: user-defined shortcuts/actions that invoke VS Code commands. Useful for small workflow automations; avoid exposing internal implementation details.
Display name of the quick action.
codeMarkPlus.features.quickActions.comma: VS Code command ID to execute.
Optional array of arguments to pass to the command.
codeMarkPlus.features.quickActions.short: Optional description of a keyboard shortcut for this action.
Optional Codicon name (e.g., $(tag)) or emoji to show for the action.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.descript: List of tag priority overrides with optional color and icon metadata.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.tag.desc: Tag text to match (e.g., TODO, FIXME).
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.priority: Priority used for sorting and resolving conflicts. Higher values indicate more important tags.
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.color.de: Optional color for this tag (hex like #RRGGBB or rgba()).
codeMarkPlus.tags.tagPriorities.icon.des: Optional Codicon name (e.g., $(tag)) or emoji to display for this tag.
codeMarkPlus.tags.refresh.title: Refresh annotations
codeMarkPlus.openAddress.title: Open address / Go to location
codeMarkPlus.appendToTodoFile.title: Promote selection to contextual note
